children.heading: .—Commission
children.label: 1 .—Commission
children.text: The term “Commission” means a Commission or Authority established under section 15301.

children.label: I
children.text: in existence on the date of the enactment of this chapter; and

children.label: I
children.text: is organized and operated in a manner that ensures broad-based community participation and an effective opportunity for local officials, community leaders, and the public to contribute to the development and implementation of programs in the region;

children.label: bb
children.text: designees or employees of a general purpose unit of local government that have been appointed to represent the unit of local government; and

children.label: III
children.text: is certified by the Governor or appropriate State officer as having a charter or authority that includes the economic development of counties, portions of counties, or other political subdivisions within the region; and

children.label: i
children.text: inappropriately used Federal grant funds from any Federal source; or

children.label: ii
children.text: appointed an officer who, during the period in which another entity inappropriately used Federal grant funds from any Federal source, was an officer of the other entity.

children.heading: .—Federal grant program
children.label: 3 .—Federal grant program
children.text: The term “Federal grant program” means a Federal grant program to provide assistance in carrying out economic and community development activities.

children.heading: .—Indian tribe
children.label: 4 .—Indian tribe
children.text: The term “Indian tribe” has the meaning given the term in section 4 of the Indian Self-Determination and Education Assistance Act ().25 U.S.C. 450b1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: .—Nonprofit entity
children.label: 5 .—Nonprofit entity
children.text: The term “nonprofit entity” means any organization described in section 501(c) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 and exempt from taxation under 501(a) of that Code that has been formed for the purpose of economic development.

children.heading: .—Region
children.label: 6 .—Region
children.text: The term “region” means the area covered by a Commission as described in subchapter II of chapter 157.2So in original. Probably means chapter 4 of this subtitle.2
